summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 10/10 features verified. All FCM endpoints, translation features, and language selectors working correctly.

issues: React warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage) - cosmetic console warning only, does not affect functionality
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent components - accessibility warning only

backend_login.details: Login with konstantin_sabev@abv.bg / Banane.com returns token and user info

backend_translate_to_bulgarian.details: POST /api/translate with 'Good morning' to bg returns Cyrillic Bulgarian text

backend_translate_to_german.details: POST /api/translate with target_language='de' returns German text

backend_fcm_subscribe.details: POST /api/notifications/subscribe-fcm accepts fcm_token and returns {status: 'subscribed', token_type: 'fcm'}

backend_push_subscribe_firebase_enabled.details: POST /api/notifications/subscribe returns firebase_enabled: true confirming Firebase Admin SDK initialized

backend_languages_endpoint.details: GET /api/languages returns 16 supported languages including bg, en, de, es, fr, etc.

frontend_login.details: Login with email/password works and redirects to /chat

frontend_yordan_chat.details: Clicking Yordan conversation opens chat with emoji messages

frontend_translation_selector_in_header.details: Language selector button in chat header shows flag + language name (e.g., '🇧🇬 Български', '🇩🇪 Deutsch')

frontend_translation_dialog_title.details: Language dialog shows title 'Превод на съобщения' (Message Translation)

frontend_language_options.details: Dialog shows 17 language options including Auto, English, Bulgarian, German, French, etc.

frontend_language_selection_updates_butt.details: Selecting German updates header button to show '🇩🇪 Deutsch'

frontend_message_click_reveals_translati.details: Clicking on message shows translation with 'tap for emoji' hint and 'Original' section

frontend_settings_ui_language_section.details: Settings dialog has 'Език на интерфейса' (UI Language) section

frontend_settings_inline_language_button.details: Settings shows inline language buttons for 17+ languages

frontend_independent_language_selectors.details: Translation language (header) and UI language (Settings) operate independently

critical_code_review_comments: Firebase Admin SDK successfully initialized at server.py line 62-66 using firebase-service-account.json
FCM subscribe endpoint at /api/notifications/subscribe-fcm (line 2179-2201) stores fcm_token with token_type='fcm'
Push subscribe endpoint at /api/notifications/subscribe (line 2160-2177) returns firebase_enabled: true
Translation endpoint at /api/translate (line 1521-1540) uses LLM for translation with language detection
Mobile MessageBubble.tsx correctly implements: own messages don't translate (line 81-86), received messages translate on tap
Mobile ChatScreen.tsx has language selector button in header (line 357-364) with Modal for selection
Web ChatLayout.jsx has separate translationLang (localStorage) and userLanguage (server-persisted) states
Web LanguageSelector component uses label='Превод' to show 'Превод на съобщения' dialog title
seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation with Yordan containing emoji messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Backend: FCM endpoints (/api/notifications/subscribe-fcm, /api/notifications/subscribe) work correctly with Firebase Admin SDK initialized. Translation API translates to Bulgarian with Cyrillic characters. Frontend: Translation language selector in chat header shows 'Превод на съобщения' dialog, Settings has 'Език на интерфейса' section with inline buttons. Both selectors work independently - translation stored in localStorage, UI language persisted to server. Mobile code cannot be tested in browser but API endpoints verified.
tests_passed: Backend: POST /api/translate to Bulgarian returns Cyrillic text
Backend: FCM subscribe requires fcm_token (400 without)
Frontend: Language selector in header shows flag + name
Frontend: Translation dialog has 'Превод на съобщения' title
Frontend: Selecting German updates header button
Frontend: Message click reveals translation with Original section
Frontend: Settings has 'Език на интерфейса' section
Frontend: Settings has inline language buttons
Frontend: Both language selectors work independently
mobile_code_notes: Mobile React Native code (MessageBubble.tsx, ChatScreen.tsx) reviewed but cannot be tested in browser. Code review confirms: 1) MessageBubble only translates received messages (line 81-86), own messages just show original text, 2) ChatScreen has language selector button with Modal in header
